name: useid-polyfill
description: React useId polyfill for React 16/17 with SSR support

scripts.test:react16: npm install --save-dev react@16 react-dom@16 @testing-library/react@12 --legacy-peer-deps --silent && vitest run
scripts.test:react17: npm install --save-dev react@17 react-dom@17 @testing-library/react@12 --legacy-peer-deps --silent && vitest run
scripts.test:react18: npm install --save-dev react@18 react-dom@18 @testing-library/react@16 @testing-library/dom --legacy-peer-deps --silent && vitest run
scripts.test:react19: npm install --save-dev react@19 react-dom@19 @testing-library/react@16 @testing-library/dom --legacy-peer-deps --silent && vitest run
scripts.test:all: npm run test:react16 && npm run test:react17 && npm run test:react18 && npm run test:react19
